issues.description: Day 1 infinite stall — player can remain on day 1 indefinitely without traveling, avoiding all debt interest and day pressure.
issues.evidence: Interest and day advance only occur in travelTo(); no passive day tick on market screen.
issues.recommendation: Apply interest on end-of-day action or cap day-1 idle time; consider auto-advancing after N market actions.

issues.description: Unlimited cumulative debt — maxBorrow ($25,000) is per-transaction only; repeated borrows stack without ceiling.
issues.evidence: bankBorrow() in engine.js adds to debt with no total cap check.
issues.recommendation: Add CONFIG.maxTotalDebt or cap cumulative borrowing at 2–3× starting debt.

issues.description: Gun stacking yields ≥100% fight kill chance at 5+ guns (0.45 + 0.12×guns), trivializing Feds encounters.
issues.evidence: doFight() in gangwars.html uses uncapped guns multiplier.
issues.recommendation: Cap fight bonus at 85–90% or cap guns at 3–4; add diminishing returns per gun.

issues.description: Up to 5 independent travel events can fire on a single trip (market event + mugging + find + stash + gun + feds).
issues.evidence: runTravelEvents() rolls each event independently with no mutual exclusion.
issues.recommendation: Limit to 1–2 events per travel or use weighted single-roll table.

issues.description: Monte Carlo simulator only buys guns when guns === 0; UI allows unlimited gun purchases.
issues.recommendation: Align simulator with UI for accurate balance testing.

issues.description: sweep.js uses $5M perfect score threshold; engine uses $10M (PERFECT_SCORE_NET_WORTH).
End-game leaderboard scrolls (.eos-rows overflow-y:auto), violating static non-scrolling layout spec.
issues.recommendation: Show top 5 fixed rows or paginate; fit within static frame.

issues.description: Bank modal errors use alert() instead of inline error display used in trade modal.
issues.recommendation: Use inline #terr-style error element for consistency.

issues.description: Dead drop goods added without cost basis — sell shows 100% margin with no avg cost tracking.
issues.evidence: eventFind() increments inventory only; no costBasis update.
issues.recommendation: Set costBasis to 0 or show 'found goods' separately in profit display.

issues.description: Save state and high scores stored as plain JSON in localStorage — fully client-editable.
issues.recommendation: Accept for offline PWA; optional checksum or server leaderboard for competitive integrity.

issues.description: Full innerHTML rebuild on every render() — no DOM diffing; potential jank on low-end devices during rapid modal transitions.
issues.evidence: All render functions set app.innerHTML wholesale.
issues.recommendation: Acceptable at current scale; profile if adding animations or larger lists.

issues.description: High Scores screen uses scrollable table (overflow:auto), inconsistent with static layout elsewhere.
issues.recommendation: Use fixed 10-row layout matching end-game screen.

issues.description: Orphan hero.jpg on disk; README still references it instead of title-screen.png.
sw.js ICON_PATTERN references icon-180.png which does not exist on disk.
issues.evidence: sw.js line 79; only apple-touch-icon.png and icon-192/512 exist.
issues.recommendation: Remove icon-180 from pattern or add file.

issues.description: index.html redirect stub not precached — offline entry via / may fail if only index.html bookmarked.
issues.recommendation: Add index.html to precache or document gangwars.html as canonical entry.

issues.description: Borrow UI shows maxBorrow per transaction regardless of current debt level — misleading display.
issues.recommendation: Show remaining borrow capacity if total cap added.

issues.description: Bribe at $0 cash shows message with no HP penalty — player can retry fight/run indefinitely.
issues.evidence: doBribe() redraws with 'Nothing to pay them with' without consuming turn.
issues.recommendation: Treat failed bribe as a combat round or force run attempt.

issues.description: Goods icons use empty alt text; screen readers cannot identify commodities.

verified: Title → New Game → Market → Tutorial overlay
Market → MOVE → Travel → District → Events → Market
Market → THE DON / BANK → Bank modal → DONE → Market
Market → BUY/SELL → Trade modal → CLOSE → Market
End Game → Play Again / Main Menu
notes: Travel row disabled for current location
Escape key dismisses modals when modalEscape set

stateManagement.pattern: Closure-scoped S + modal function reference; manual save()/render() after mutations
stateManagement.migration: migrateSave() handles legacy commodity ID remapping
